title: James Robertson
text: Home * People * James Robertson James Robertson [1] James Robertson , an American computer chess programmer and author of the chess program Insomniac . He started programming when he was about 14, and wrote his first computer chess program in QBasic [2] to soon switch to C++ to develop Insomniac [3] .
